parameters.name: cono
parameters.description: The company context to use. Defaults to user default

parameters.name: divi
parameters.description: The division context to use. Defaults to user default

parameters.name: lanc
parameters.description: The language code to use. Defaults to user default

parameters.name: maxrecs
parameters.description: Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited

parameters.name: excludeempty
parameters.description: When true, empty fields are omitted in response

parameters.name: righttrim
parameters.description: When true, all values are right trimmed in response

parameters.name: returncols
parameters.description: A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns

parameters.name: extendedresult
parameters.description: Show transaction parameters in the response

parameters.name: positionkey
parameters.description: The position in a table to start reading from

parameters.description: The division context to use. Defaults to user default

parameters.name: lanc
parameters.description: The language code to use. Defaults to user default

parameters.name: maxrecs
parameters.description: Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited

parameters.name: excludeempty
parameters.description: When true, empty fields are omitted in response

parameters.name: righttrim
parameters.description: When true, all values are right trimmed in response

parameters.name: returncols
parameters.description: A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns

parameters.name: extendedresult
parameters.description: Show transaction parameters in the response

parameters.name: positionkey
parameters.description: The position in a table to start reading from

200.description: The transaction was executed as requested

errorType.description:
BackendInternalError - An unexpected error attributed to the job execution occurred
InputFieldTooLong - A given input field value was longer than allowed
InternalError - An unexpected error attributed to the transport layer occurred
InvalidLanguage - The resolved language is not supported
InvalidPositionKey - The resolved positionKey is invalid
InvalidSystemConfiguration - The resolved company/division is not configured with a valid system configuration
InvalidTenant - Unable to resolve a valid tenant
InvalidUser - The resolved user is invalid
InvalidUserConoDivi - The resolved company/division does not exist or the user does not have access to it
MalformedRequest - Invalid request format
MandatoryInputFieldNotFound - Mandatory field not included in request
RequestIOError - Error when reading request
RunAsNotAllowed - The user is not allowed to run as another user
RunAsTenantNotAllowed - The user is not allowed to run as another tenant
ServerReturnedNOK - Transaction executed with result NOK
ServiceNotAvailable - There is a temporary problem connecting to an internal service or communicating with the job itself
TransactionNotFound - Program or transaction not found
